sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game; sub-pixel precision not applicable

special_mechanics.name: pipe_placement
special_mechanics.description: Grid-based puzzle mechanic where player clicks to place pipe sections from a 5-piece dispenser column; pieces cannot be rotated or flipped

special_mechanics.name: flooz_flow
special_mechanics.description: Green slime (flooz/goo) flows through placed pipes after a set time delay; continues until reaching open end or blockage

special_mechanics.name: wrapping_edges
special_mechanics.description: Later levels feature openings at opposite grid edges allowing flooz to wrap around from one edge to another

special_mechanics.name: reservoir_delay
special_mechanics.description: Reservoir pipe sections take a few seconds to fill once flooz enters, providing extra time for pipe placement

special_mechanics.name: one_way_pipes
special_mechanics.description: Special pipe sections restrict flow to indicated direction only

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative rating. Pipe Dream is a grid-based puzzle game with no character physics or movement parameters. No jump, gravity, acceleration, or velocity mechanics apply. Game centers on pipe placement mechanics, flooz flow physics (time-based progression), and level design progression.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Pipe Dream (NES)
